hypothesis: Using ATR based risk management and trend following strategy with RSI and Bollinger Bands to identify a strong uptrend.

Ajustement structurel basé sur le diagnostic précédent.

Exploring a new approach for improved results using momentum, ADX and Aroon along with Bollinger bands and Donchian channels. This strategy aims to identify a trending market and capitalize on it by entering a long position when the price breaks out above the upper Bollinger band and the RSI is over 50 while also confirming an uptrend with the ADX and exiting at the first sign of a trend reversal or when the RSI falls below 50. Similarly, it enters a short position when the price breaks out below the lower Donchian channel and the RSI is under 50 while also confirming a downtrend with the ADX and exiting at the first sign of a trend reversal or when the RSI rises above 50.
